title: chamaefistula excelsa
intro: Chamaecrista excelsa, also known as the sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chamaecrista excelsa include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Chamaecrista excelsa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of the world.
